Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our fence company services.

How long will a wood fence last in New York?

With proper maintenance, a well-constructed wood fence can last 15-20 years in New York. Regular staining and sealing are essential to protect it from the elements.

What type of wood is best for fences in NYC?

Pressure-treated pine and cedar are excellent choices for fences in NYC. They are naturally resistant to rot and insects, making them ideal for our humid climate.

Do I need a permit to build a fence in New York City?

Yes, in most cases, you will need a permit to build a fence in New York City. We can handle the permit application process for you.

Reviews From Our Fence Company Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Fence Factory did an amazing job installing my new wood fence in my backyard. The team was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic! They were very communicative throughout the entire process, and the price was very reasonable. Highly recommend!"

Maria S. Wood Fence Installation

"I needed a chain link fence installed around my commercial property for security purposes. Fence Factory provided a quick and affordable solution. The installation was completed within a day, and the fence is sturdy and well-built. I had a minor issue with the gate latch, but they came back and fixed it promptly."

David K. Chain Link Fence Installation

"I am so happy with my new vinyl fence from Fence Factory! It has completely transformed my backyard. The quality of the materials is excellent, and the installation was flawless. The crew was very respectful of my property and cleaned up everything afterwards. I've already received so many compliments from my neighbors."

Jennifer L. Vinyl Fence Installation
